author: Red Cogs
install_msg: Thanks for installing NicknameTracker! Use `[p]nicktrack @User` to view nickname history. Use `[p]slash enablecog nicktracker` and `[p]slash sync` to enable slash commands.
name: NicknameTracker
short: Track nickname changes in your server
description: Logs every nickname change per user with timestamps. Supports prefix commands and slash commands. Tracks joins, leaves, and rejoins. History is capped at 50 entries per user and persists across bot restarts.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores nickname change history (old nick, new nick, timestamp) per guild. No personal data is shared with third parties.
